title: Hundreds of public sector workers protest Bill 9 outside Calgary hospital
notes: Bill 9 (Public Sector Arbitration Deferral Act) protests. Bill delayed wage arbitration for 180,000 teachers, nurses, public sector workers. AUPE president: 'attack on workers rights.' Bill 9 context for EVT-007 (earplugs during Bill 9 debate June 2019) and EVT-051 (nurses arbitration May 2019). The earplug incident and nurses freeze are upstream events of this broader Bill 9 impact.
